permissions.name: network
permissions.desc: VeritasLens sends a short audio snippet to Google Gemini to fact-check what was just said. Your API key and audio never leave the device except for the request you trigger.

permissions.name: g2-microphone
permissions.desc: VeritasLens listens to a rolling 30-second buffer of nearby audio in memory only. Audio is never written to disk and is dropped immediately after each fact-check.
